title: Automations on mirrored items
excerpt: Hi I need some help figuring out an automation. I have two boards that are connected and items that are mirrored. I want to create an automation so that when the mirrored status column changes to something, then to move …

posts.author: wenzday (wenzday)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi I need some help figuring out an automation. I have two boards that are connected and items that are mirrored. I want to create an automation so that when the mirrored status column changes to something, then to move the item to a group. Right now the automation creator is not recognizing that there is a mirrored status column, and is asking me to create a new status column. If the item is mirrored into another board and the status column is also mirrored and connected, shouldn’t the board be able to recognize and take actions on the mirrored items???

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
You’ll need to use an automation template instead of ‘building your own’. Go to templates at the top and then ‘mirror’ on the left.

You’ll need to use the ‘status changes to something, then change status’ one. Then use a build your own automation that when Status changes (not the mirror one), then move to group.

image1538×782 92.8 KB

posts.author: Ben_Muncaster (Ben )
posts.cookedHtml: I need this a lot - use the template automations to change another Status then use that staus to move the item to a group. I just put these ‘trigger’ status in at the end of the board then hide them in the views
